title: Protocol for acquiring high-quality fresh mouse lung spatial transcriptomics data.
author: Jiang Y Li Y Cheng M Xu J Wei X Liu C
content: S-EPMC10840344 PMC10840344 Protocol for acquiring high-quality fresh mouse lung spatial transcriptomics data. Spatial transcriptomics analysis allows the examination of the biological characteristics and spatial distribution of individual lung cells at a single-cell resolution. However, due
